room_prompt:
[SCENESMITH_SCHOOL_CONTRACT_V1 room_id=girls_toilet profile=school_reference_20260710]
Immutable effective prompt SHA-256: ac8d297cc9a2d605f41b4bcd7abd52aac29bfd0f195875840342ee1e6a7da86f

Use warm cream/beige/off-white walls, light wood furniture and flooring, soft daylight, warm ceiling light, organized school displays, realistic scale, greenery, and clear humanoid/robot circulation. Nothing may float, visibly interpenetrate, block a door, or eliminate a usable walking/turning path.

ROOM-SPECIFIC REQUIRED CONTENTS:
Create a clean compact girls school toilet beside the boys toilet with at least two toilet fixtures/stalls, at least two sinks and mirrors, stall partitions, soap dispenser, paper-towel dispenser or hand dryer, trash bin, sanitary disposal bin, tiled floor/walls, and unblocked access.

--- FLOOR-PLANNER CONTEXT (SECONDARY) ---
Compact girls school restroom beside the boys restroom and foyer.

observations: View 1 clearly shows two toilets in stalls and an open central floor area for circulation.
View 2 shows a double sink vanity with two mirror panels above, a trash bin, and a wall-mounted dryer/dispenser unit near the door wall.
View 3 shows stall partitions and warm wall sconces, but no window/daylight cues.

clear_circulation.label: Door clearance, aisles, and humanoid/robot circulation are visibly usable.
clear_circulation.observation: Large open floor area with unobstructed approach to stalls and sinks; door swing area at bottom-right does not appear blocked.

collision_free_support.observation: Major fixtures (vanity, partitions, toilets, bins, wall unit) appear grounded and aligned; no obvious floating or harsh interpenetration is visible.

daylight_and_warm_lighting.label: Natural daylight and warm interior lighting are visible.
daylight_and_warm_lighting.observation: Warm wall sconces are visible, but no windows/skylight/daylight contribution is visible in any view.

inventory:drying.observation: A wall-mounted hand-dryer/paper-towel style unit is visible near the right-side wall by the entry area.

inventory:mirrors.observation: Two mirror panels are visible above the sink vanity.

inventory:sinks.observation: A double-basin sink vanity is visible with two basins and faucets.

inventory:soap.observation: A dispenser on a stand is placed near the sinks, consistent with a soap/sanitizer dispenser for handwashing.

inventory:toilets.label: Required inventory is visibly represented: toilet fixtures/stalls.
inventory:toilets.observation: Two toilet fixtures are clearly visible in the top view within stall areas.

inventory:trash.label: Required inventory is visibly represented: trash bin.
inventory:trash.observation: A lidded trash bin is visible in the open area near the sinks.
